revision.text:
[[Peoples]] of the [[:en:Ancient history|ancient world]] (i.e. prior to AD 476). ''For individuals, see [[:Category:Ancient people]].'' {{catdiffuse}} {{Commons category|Ancient peoples}} {{CatAutoTOC}} <!--Categories-->
<!--Other languages--> {{draft categories| [[Category:Ancient people|+]] [[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] [[Category:r2024-01-19]] }} [[Category:enwiki linked categories]][[en:Category:Ancient peoples]] [[en:Ancient peoples]] [[Category:Categories with 2 members]] [[en:Category:Ancient peoples]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]
